name: Kurt Rosenwinkel
abstract: Kurt Rosenwinkel (born October 28, 1970) is an American jazz guitarist, composer, bandleader, producer, educator, keyboardist and record label owner.

concerts.label: Kurt Rosenwinkel, Guitar, and Jean-Paul Brodbeck, Keyboards
